column2: Verify System Rejection of Battery Fire Environmental Risk User Story
column3: ['Log in to the application as a user with appropriate permissions to create new user stories. ', 'Navigate to the page where user stories can be created. ', 'Enter details for a new user story related to battery-fire environmental risk on ground and attempt to submit it. ']
column4: ['Successfully logged in. ', 'Reached the user story creation page. ', 'The system should not allow the submission of this user story, either by displaying an error message or preventing the form from being submitted. ']
